channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Retired Teacher Loses Sh46 Million in ATM Scam and Faces Investigation Costs
item.description: Ms Magreth Jacob, a retired teacher from Babati in Manyara Region, has suffered a huge financial loss of Sh46 million after her ATM card was allegedly swallowed by a machine on Election Day, October 2...

item.title: 1954 Jaguar XK120 SE Drophead Coupe: Features and History of the Special Equipment Model
item.description: The 1954 Jaguar XK120 SE Drophead Coupe represents a pinnacle of mid-20th century British automotive design and engineering. As a Special Equipment variant of the iconic XK120 series, this model was e...

item.title: Raja Pervez Ashraf Denies Links After Allegations by Anmol 'Pinky'
item.description: In Islamabad, PPP leader and former Prime Minister Raja Pervez Ashraf has firmly denied any association with alleged drug baroness Anmol, also known as Pinky, after a video surfaced in which she purpo...

item.title: Tanzania and Rwanda Strengthen Energy Ties with Joint Power and Gas Projects
item.description: Tanzania and Rwanda have just signed a major bilateral energy cooperation deal on 19 May 2026 in Kigali, during the second Nuclear Energy Innovation Summit for Africa (NEISA 2026). The agreement, sign...

item.title: Floods in Davao City Force Hundreds to Evacuate, One Fatality Reported
item.description: Heavy rains caused by the easterlies and the Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ) triggered severe flooding in several areas of Davao City starting Monday night, May 19, 2026. The floods resulted in ...

item.title: Super Eagles Drawn with Madagascar, Tanzania and Guinea-Bissau in AFCON 2027 Qualifiers
item.description: Nigeria football fans are buzzing after the AFCON 2027 qualifiers draw placed the Super Eagles in a group with Madagascar, Tanzania and Guinea-Bissau. The draw took place in Cairo at the Egyptian Foot...

item.title: Kim Novak: Iconic 1950s Portraits and Hollywood Journey
item.description: Kim Novak, born on February 13, 1933, is an American retired actress and painter whose impact on cinema has been recognized with multiple awards, including two Golden Globes, a Golden Lion for Lifetim...

item.title: Senator Bill Cassidy Supports Resolution Limiting Presidential War Powers After Primary Loss
item.description: Senator Bill Cassidy (R-LA), following his defeat in the Republican primary influenced by President Donald Trump, has taken a notable political stance by voting with Democrats to advance a resolution ...

item.title: How Better Eye Care and Glasses Improve Productivity for Kenya’s Tea Farmers and Workers
item.description: As Kenya marks International Tea Day on 21st May, one big issue affecting our tea sector is poor eyesight among farmers and factory workers. Kenya is one of the top tea producers globally and the larg...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of the 1994 US World Cup: Organisers, Players and Unforgettable Moments
item.description: The 1994 FIFA World Cup in the United States was a landmark event that transformed soccer in the country, but it was also a summer of chaos, celebrity mishaps and logistical challenges. Scott LeTellie...

item.title: Super Eagles Group L Fixtures Against Madagascar, Tanzania, and Guinea Bissau in 2027 AFCON Qualifiers
item.description: Nigeria's Super Eagles don land for Group L alongside Tanzania, Madagascar, and Guinea Bissau for the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualifiers, wey dem go jointly host with Kenya and Uganda. The draw hap...

item.title: Timmins faces difficulty recruiting doctors due to regional shortages
item.description: The city of Timmins, Ontario, is currently facing a significant challenge in healthcare due to a shortage of physicians, highlighted by the experiences of its sole ophthalmologist. Recruitment of new ...

item.title: The Cardiff Giant: The Story Behind America’s Famous 19th-Century Hoax
item.description: The Cardiff Giant was a 10-foot-tall gypsum statue that became one of the most notorious archaeological hoaxes in U.S. history. It was “discovered” on October 16, 1869, on a farm in Cardiff, New York,...

item.description: A former contractor at the failed lifestyle app vVoosh has alleged that Manuel Fernandez, a close friend and business partner of Sarah Ferguson, used his royal connections to threaten him with impriso...

item.description: On Wednesday, the Islamabad High Court (IHC) issued notices regarding multiple applications seeking early hearings of sentence suspension pleas filed by human rights lawyers Imaan Zainab Mazari-Hazir ...

item.title: Cleric Hails Oloyede for Transforming JAMB into Model Public Institution

item.title: Using DNA Analysis of Scat to Protect the Critically Endangered Gilbert’s Potoroo
item.description: Researchers in Western Australia are applying advanced DNA analysis techniques to support conservation efforts for Gilbert’s potoroo, one of the world’s rarest marsupials, with fewer than 150 individu...

item.title: Dr. Amir Khan advises caution with supplements due to risk of overdose and inconsistent dosing
item.description: Dr. Amir Khan has raised concerns about the safety of certain dietary supplements, emphasizing that the industry is not regulated like medicines. Speaking on ITV's Lorraine, he highlighted that many s...

item.title: James Hunt Strikes Track Marshal After Collision at 1977 Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: During the 1977 Canadian Grand Prix at Mosport Park, Formula 1 driver James Hunt became infamous for his aggressive behavior on the track. While battling for the lead against Mario Andretti, Hunt atte...

item.title: Guide to Applying for the August 2026 Civil Service Exam in the Philippines
item.description: Filipinos aiming for entry-level government positions, including K to 12 graduates, can apply for the Career Service Examination–Pen and Paper Test (CSE-PPT) scheduled on August 9, 2026. The Civil Ser...
